data.title: Helados Italia
data.description: My first professional project. An interactive website for a local ice cream shop, developed from scratch with HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript. Includes product catalog, contact information, and responsive design.

data.title: Bowling de Paso
data.description: Website with SSR format developed for an entertainment company. I implemented a modern and dynamic interface using React with Vite, meeting all client requirements.

data.title: App Restaurant
data.description: Desktop application for restaurant management. Developed in C# with Windows Forms, includes client management, income tracking, reservations, and SQLite database for local storage.

data.title: Tu Amigo FI
data.description: Complete web platform for personal financial management. Built with Next.js and PostgreSQL, allows recording expenses, income, categorizing transactions, and generating reports. Integration with Cloudinary for image storage.

data.title: Carta QR
data.description: QR digital menu web application for restaurants. Allows customers to view the menu by scanning a QR code. Developed with Next.js and PostgreSQL, with an admin panel to manage the menu.
